VAL-RING-006.evidence: Documentation for INT8 partial quantization assessment not found in any of the expected files. Checked: (1) /opt/mi50grad/tests/test_ring_integration.py - no INT8/quantization mentions; (2) /opt/mi50grad/tests/test_ring_allreduce.py - no INT8/quantization mentions; (3) /opt/mi50grad/bench/tp4_optimization_report.md - only generic INT8 mentions (INT8/FP8 activations row in future work table, INT8 quantization row in optimization table), no specific assessment of INT8 partial quantization for ring allreduce. The validation contract requires: 'documentation in test_ring_integration.py or optimization report noting INT8 partial quantization assessment.' This documentation does not exist. grep commands used: 'grep -in INT8 test_ring_integration.py' returned empty, 'grep -in INT8 test_ring_allreduce.py' returned empty.

frictions: The prior user-testing synthesis (round 1) incorrectly set VAL-RING-006 to 'passed' in validation-state.json while the synthesis.json itself correctly recorded it as 'failed'. This inconsistency needed to be reconciled in round 2.
